patch.value: Refresh 2026-07-15 npm dependency updates with compatibility and release-gate proof

Update the currently reported npm package set in compatibility-safe groups, separating major runtime/type-system migrations from patch/minor tooling updates, while preserving exact coverage, package contracts, and release gates.

Current pnpm outdated report is reconciled; safe patch/minor updates land with lockfile and zero-vulnerability proof; TypeScript 7, @types/node 26, and eslint-plugin-unicorn 71 majors are evaluated separately against Node 22/24/26 and package builds; 100/100/100/100 coverage and release gates remain green.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Duplicate check evidence 2026-07-15: all-status search for dependency updates vulnerabilities outdated packages found only closed historical refresh items,chiefly pm-a2g6; no active July 15 dependency-refresh item exists. Live pnpm audit reports zero vulnerabilities and Dependabot reports zero open alerts. pnpm outdated reports safe patch/minor candidates plus major TypeScript,Node types,and unicorn migrations that require compatibility proof.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: pnpm outdated snapshot 2026-07-15 (review pass #89): patch/minor — @vitest/coverage-v8+vitest 4.1.9→4.1.10, jscpd 5.0.11→5.0.12, tsx 4.23.0→4.23.1, @sentry/node 10.63.0→10.65.0, eslint 10.6.0→10.7.0, eslint-plugin-sonarjs 4.1.0→4.2.0, greptile 3.1.1→3.2.0, typescript-eslint 8.62.1→8.64.0. MAJORS needing compatibility proof — @types/node 22.20.1→26.1.1 (engines floor is >=22.18, types should track the floor, likely stay on 22.x or bump floor decision), typescript 6.0.3→7.0.2 (gate + build + type-strip loader proof), eslint-plugin-unicorn 70.0.0→71.1.0 (rule churn vs eslint-suppressions.json A+ baseline). Majors are each their own gate-proof commit; never bundle with patch sweeps.

value.author: codex-audit-20260715
value.text: Review pass 91 dependency evidence from pnpm outdated: remaining current candidates include Vitest and coverage 4.1.10, jscpd 5.0.12, tsx 4.23.1, Sentry 10.65, ESLint 10.7, sonarjs 4.2, Greptile 3.2, typescript-eslint 8.64, @types/node 26.1.1, eslint-plugin-unicorn 71.1, and TypeScript 7.0.2. pnpm audit reports zero advisories across 330 dependencies. Preserve the existing compatibility-matrix and batched-upgrade scope.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Dependency snapshot advanced 2026-07-17 (user-directed dependabot triage, pass #94): MERGED to main — dev-deps group #572 (@vitest/coverage-v8+vitest 4.1.10, eslint 10.7.0, greptile 3.2.0, jscpd 5.0.12, tsx 4.23.1, typescript-eslint 8.64.0), eslint-plugin-unicorn 71.1.0 (#541), @sentry/node 10.65.0 (#538), @types/node 26.1.1 (#540 — required the SetIterator annotation fix in src/core/extensions/item-fields.ts; frozen ReadonlySet wrappers must return SetIterator under the node-26 libs). NOT adopted: typescript 7.0.2 (#539) — closed via dependabot major-version ignore; migration owned by pm-do5b (typescript-eslint peer <6.1.0 + no stable JS compiler API for static-quality-gate.mts). Remaining majors from the #89 snapshot: TS7 only (types/node 26 now DONE).

value.author: codex-wide-sdk-20260719
value.text: 2026-07-19 dependency snapshot: pnpm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities across 341 dependencies. Remaining outdated candidates are @toon-format/toon 2.3.0 to 2.3.1, greptile 3.2.0 to 3.2.2, @sentry/node 10.65.0 to 10.66.0, eslint-plugin-sonarjs 4.1.0 to 4.2.0, eslint-plugin-unicorn 71.1.0 to 72.0.0, and TypeScript 6.0.3 to 7.0.2. Preserved this canonical open upgrade lane; no duplicate and no unrelated dependency churn in the current PR.
